pages.title: Half-Orc
pages.text: Brawny. Slightly large and broad. Height 1.08, width 1.08. Built for melee.

pages.title: Traits
pages.text: $(bold)Low-Light Vision.$(/) Faint light is enough.$(br2)$(bold)Savage Attacks.$(/) +1 flat melee damage.$(br2)$(bold)Relentless Endurance.$(/) When a hit would drop you very low, you get brief Resistance and Regeneration. Long cooldown before it can re-trigger.

pages.title: Drawback
pages.text: $(bold)Dull to Magic.$(/) Spell power -20% across arcane, fire, frost, and healing. The mirror of the High Elf's weak melee.$(br2)Do not pick Half-Orc and then try to play $(l:classes/mage)Mage$(/l). The math fights you.
